params.args: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" /> specifying the variation position, palette index, and palette overrides.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> created with the specified font arguments.
fields.summary: Creates a copy of this typeface with the specified font arguments applied.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> using the specified palette.
fields.summary: Creates a copy of this typeface using the specified color palette.

params.position: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the desired axis values.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified variation positions applied.
fields.summary: Creates a copy of this typeface with the specified variation axis positions.

fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> that represents an empty typeface with no glyphs.
fields.summary: Gets a static empty typeface with no glyphs.

params.axes: The span to receive the variation axis parameter definitions.

fields.returns: The number of variation axis parameters written to the span.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the variation design parameters for this typeface.

params.coordinates: The span to receive the current variation axis coordinates.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to the span.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the current variation design position coordinates for this typeface.

fields.value: true if this typeface has no glyphs; otherwise, false.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface contains no glyphs.

fields.value: The number of variation design parameters defined in this typeface.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design parameters for this typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> describing the variation axes of this typeface.
fields.summary: Gets an array of variation axis definitions for this typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> representing the current axis values for this typeface.
fields.summary: Gets an array of the current variation design position coordinates for this typeface.

fields.value: The number of variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
